_comment: This is a small toy JSON example, the real thing might be more complex.

contract/domain-schema.title: Core domain objects + validation gate every writer passes through

contract/ui-seam.title: Narrow Reader/Writer seam between data layer and UI (dual case shapes)

infra/golden-fixtures.title: Materialize the golden case cards as deterministic fixtures + manifest

platform/store.title: Append-only store: write-gate validated, confirm/override audit, seam-conforming read API

feature/us1-queue.title: US-1: prioritized queue view over the seam (golden cards A+B must render)

feature/us2-detail-audit.title: US-2: case detail + downloadable per-rule audit artifact

integration/one-boot.title: One-boot completeness: every user story reachable in one session (mutation-checked eval) + demo script update
